101001111111000100011110100000010110110010010011010101010 - ASI: 25

Rules:
  00 = 0 * 0
  01 = 0 * 1
  11 = 1 * 1
  010 = 01 * 0
  011 = 0 * 11
  100 = 1 * 00
  0001 = 00 * 01
  0110 = 011 * 0
  1010 = 1 * 010
  1111 = 11 * 11
  01000 = 010 * 00
  0001011 = 0001 * 011
  0100110 = 010 * 0110
  0110010 = 0110 * 010
  1010011 = 1010 * 011
  1111100 = 1111 * 100
  10101010 = 1010 * 1010
  111101000 = 1111 * 01000
  00010110110010 = 0001011 * 0110010
  01000111101000 = 01000 * 111101000
  10100111111100 = 1010011 * 1111100
  010011010101010 = 0100110 * 10101010
  1010011111110001000111101000 = 10100111111100 * 01000111101000
  00010110110010010011010101010 = 00010110110010 * 010011010101010
  101001111111000100011110100000010110110010010011010101010 = 1010011111110001000111101000 * 00010110110010010011010101010
